title: Thanga Magan Indru Lyrics Baasha
stanzas:
<div>
Thanga Magan Indru Lyrics Baasha

[Thanga magan indru
singa nadia potu
arugil arugil vanthaan

rendu puram pattri
urugum neruppaaga
mangai urugi nindraal] (2)

kattum aadai en kadhalan
kandathum naluviyathe
vetkathaalpaal adhu venthanai
kadathum vizhagiyathe.

raththa thaamarai
muththam kaetkuthu
vaa en vaazhve vaa.

Thanga magan indru
singa nadia potu
arugil arugil vanthaan

rendu puram pattri
urugum neruppaaga
mangai urugi nindraal

chinna kalaivaani nee
vanna silaimaeni
adhu manjam thanil
maaran thalai vaikkum
inbath thalagaani

aasai thalaivan nee
naan adimai magaraani
mangai ival angam engum
poosa neethaan maruthaani.

thirakkaatha pookkal
vediththaaga vendum.
thenpaandi thendral
thirandhaaga vendum.

enna sammathamaa
innum thaamathamaa

Thanga magan indru
singa nadia potu
arugil arugil vanthaan

rendu puram pattri
urugum neruppaaga
mangai urugi nindraal

thookkam vanthaale
manam thalaiyanai thaedaathu.
thaane vandhu kadhal
kollum ullam jadhagam
paarkaathu.

megam mazhai thanthaal
thuli maele pogaathu.
pennin mana vaanil
vizhavendum vidhithaan
maraadhu.

en perin pinne
nee seravaendum.
kadal konda gangai
niram maara vendum

enai maatri vidu
idhazh ootri kodu.

[Thanga magan indru
singa nadia potu
arugil arugil vanthaan

rendu puram pattri
urugum neruppaaga
mangai urugi nindraal] (2)

kattum aadai en kadhalan
kandathum naluviyatho
vetkathaalpaal adhu venthanai
kadathum vizhagiyatho

muththam enbathan
artham pazhagida vaa
en vazhve vaa.

Thanga magan indru
singa nadia potu
arugil arugil vanthaan

rendu puram pattri
urugum neruppaaga
mangai urugi nindraal

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song 'Thanga Magan Indru'?

The song expresses deep feelings of love and longing, reflecting the emotional journey of the characters in the movie.

What is the plot context of the song in the movie Baasha?

In Baasha, the song plays during a pivotal moment that highlights the protagonist's romantic feelings and struggles.

Who are the singers of this song?

The song features the melodious voices of K.J. Yesudhas and K.S. Chithra.

Who composed the music for 'Thanga Magan Indru'?

The music for this beautiful song was composed by Deva.

When was 'Thanga Magan Indru' released?

The song was released on January 12, 1995.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In the film Baasha, 'Thanga Magan Indru' serves as a poignant expression of love and yearning. The song beautifully encapsulates the emotions of the characters, showcasing their deep connection and struggles. With its melodious tune and heartfelt lyrics, it evokes a sense of nostalgia and romance. This timeless classic continues to resonate with audiences, making it a beloved piece in Tamil cinema.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Thanga Magan Indru is a timeless melody that captures the essence of love and longing, beautifully rendered by the legendary voices of K.J. Yesudhas and K.S. Chithra. This enchanting song from the classic film Baasha showcases the magical composition of Deva, making it a cherished favorite among fans. Experience the nostalgia and romance that this song evokes, transporting you to a world of heartfelt emotions.
stanzaMeanings: Today, the golden son has come near like a lion.
The two sides melt like fire when the girl melts in the heat.
My lover, even if you see me in a rough state, it doesn't matter; it will still be beautiful.
The red lotus is calling, come, my life, come.
Today, the golden son has come near like a lion.
The two sides melt like fire when the girl melts in the heat.
Little artist, you are a beautiful sight; it will place a crown on the head of the one who is destined to die.
You are the king of desires, I am the slave; this girl is everywhere, you are the healer.
Flowers that do not bloom must bloom. The southern breeze must open up.
Is it acceptable to me or is it still too early?
Today, the golden son has come near like a lion.
The two sides melt like fire when the girl melts in the heat.
When sleep comes, do not seek the mind; love will come and the heart will not see the fate.
When the cloud brings rain, the dew will not fall. The woman's heart must shine in the sky, it should not fade away.
You must come after my name. The color of the river must change.
Leave me and give me a kiss.
Today, the golden son has come near like a lion.
The two sides melt like fire when the girl melts in the heat.
My lover, even if you see me in a rough state, it doesn't matter; it will still be beautiful.
The meaning of the kiss is to come, my life, come.
